subjects.description: A small child wearing a bright red hooded jacket and light shorts, stepping off the curb to cross the dusty street beside the roadworks directly in the vehicle's path
subjects.appearance_details: Carries a cartoon backpack, wears light-up sneakers dusted with grit; the red jacket vivid against the tan dust haze
subjects.relationship: The pedestrian hazard that prompts the ego vehicle to brake; the central reason for the deceleration event
subjects.location: Center foreground, crossing from right sidewalk into the road
subjects.orientation: Profile view, facing left as the child walks across the road
subjects.pose: Mid-stride, one leg forward, arms slightly swinging while walking
subjects.action: Steps off the sidewalk and begins crossing the road
subjects.state_changes: Moves from curb into roadway, continuing across the vehicle's path and pausing briefly mid-road
subjects.clothing: Bright red hooded jacket, light summer shorts, light-up sneakers, cartoon backpack
subjects.expression: Unaware and casual, looking ahead across the street
subjects.facial_features: Round face, short brown hair, small features, rosy cheeks

subjects.description: A few parked cars and a work truck along the curbs of the residential street beside the roadworks
subjects.appearance_details: Sedans and a dusty work truck in muted colors, a film of construction dust on their panels near the orange barriers
subjects.relationship: Part of the residential environment; potential occlusion that hides the child until they step out
subjects.location: Left and right midground along the curbs
subjects.orientation: Parallel-parked, facing toward and away from camera along the road edges

background_setting: A North American suburban residential street beside active roadworks on a bright, dusty summer midday. Single-family homes with lawns sit behind a stretch of orange cones, barriers, and an idle excavator where a work crew has patched the two-lane asphalt. Fine construction dust hazes the air over the patched, worn road; a few parked cars and a work truck line the curbs. Sidewalks run beside the homes. The harsh overhead sun, diffused by drifting dust, casts short, hazy shadows over the patched pavement and its faded center markings.

lighting.conditions: Harsh, bright summer midday sun diffused by construction dust
lighting.direction: Overhead sun from nearly straight above, scattered by airborne dust
lighting.shadows: Short, slightly softened shadows blurred by the drifting dust haze
lighting.illumination_effect: Bright, dusty high-key light with a hazy glare; the child's red jacket cuts vividly through the tan dust haze

aesthetics.composition: Centered forward-facing ego perspective with the road vanishing toward the horizon, child positioned in the central lane, parked cars framing the sides
aesthetics.color_scheme: Dusty tan haze over bright asphalt, orange cones and barriers, summer greens, yellow machinery, and a vivid red accent from the child's jacket
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Busy, dusty summer-worksite calm broken by sudden caution
aesthetics.patterns: Repeating orange cones and barriers, patched road seams, a few parked cars and a work truck, drifting dust

cinematography.camera_motion: Forward-moving ego dashcam motion that decelerates and comes to a complete stop
cinematography.framing: Wide shot from the driver's viewpoint
cinematography.focus: Sharp on the road and crossing child; the dust haze softly veils the far background

context: Autonomous driving or ADAS demonstration of pedestrian detection and emergency braking in a residential setting

actions.description: The ego vehicle travels forward at a moderate speed down the dusty suburban residential street beside the roadworks at midday.
A small child in a red jacket steps off the right sidewalk and begins crossing into the vehicle's path.
The ego vehicle promptly applies firm, controlled braking on the gritty patched asphalt, decelerating as the nose dips slightly.
The vehicle reaches a complete stop well before the child and remains fully stopped while the child continues across.

text_and_signage_elements.appearance: White painted text on the patched asphalt, partially faded and dust-filmed, still legible beside the roadworks
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: On the road surface ahead, visible in the center of frame throughout
text_and_signage_elements.context: Traffic calming marking indicating a low-speed residential zone

segments.description: Ego vehicle cruises forward through the dusty suburban street beside the roadworks, cones and an idle excavator along the patched asphalt.
segments.key_changes: Steady forward motion at moderate speed through dust haze
segments.camera: Forward dashcam motion, smooth and steady

segments.description: A child steps off the sidewalk into the road; the vehicle begins firm, controlled braking and decelerates rapidly on the gritty surface.
segments.key_changes: Hazard appears; speed drops sharply, nose dips under braking
segments.camera: Forward motion slowing, slight forward pitch from deceleration

segments.description: The vehicle comes to a complete stop well before the child and holds stationary as the child crosses safely amid the dust and cones.
segments.key_changes: Vehicle fully stopped and held stationary

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the dashcam moves forward down a suburban residential street beside dusty roadworks at bright midday, orange cones and an idle excavator lining the patched asphalt. By 0:01 a small child in a bright red jacket steps off the right sidewalk and begins crossing directly ahead. From 0:01 to 0:03 the ego vehicle applies firm, controlled braking on the gritty patched road, slowing with a slight forward pitch. By 0:03 the vehicle has stopped completely well before the child, and from 0:03 to 0:05 it holds stationary in the dust haze while the child crosses safely.
audio_description: Bright summer-worksite sounds of an idling excavator and distant hammering, the hum of the vehicle over patched asphalt, then firm tire and brake friction on the gritty surface as it decelerates, settling into an idle amid faint machinery noise.
